hero.sub: Fumana inombolo yefowuni yasimahla nekhuselekileyo yokufowunela kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo kwihlabathi liphela nge-Wi-Fi okanye idatha. Yonwabela ukubethela ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, imiyalezo enyamalalayo, kunye neefowuni zelizwi/zevidiyo ze-HD — ngezixhobo ezakhelwe ngaphakathi zokukunceda uhlale uqhagamshelwe ngaphaya kwemida.
hero.line1: Imiyalezo ekhuselekileyo kuye nabani na, naphi na — kunye
hero.freeNote: Iifowuni ezisisiseko kunye nemiyalezo zisimahla. I-AI ephucukileyo kunye neempawu zeprimiyamu zifuna ukuphuculwa.

feature.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ulawulo lwakho.

registration.smsConsent: Ngokudala iakhawunti, uyavuma ukufumana izaziso ze-SMS ezinxulumene nomsebenzi wakho weChatforia (umz. imiyalezo evela kwabanye abasebenzisi). Amaxabiso emiyalezo kunye nedatha angasebenza. Ungakhetha ukuphuma nangaliphi na ixesha kwiSetingi.

about.title: Malunga neChatforij

values.access: Ukufikelela kubo bonke: Uguqulelo oluzenzekelayo lweelwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
values.control: Ulawulo: Ukuphela kwemiyalezo kunye nokufunda iirisithi akuxhomekekanga kukhetho.

values.control_aria: Ulawulo: Ukulahla imiyalezo kunye nokufunda iirisithi akuxhomekekanga kukhetho.

about.description: IChatforia sisithunywa esikhuselekileyo nesithetha iilwimi ezininzi esinokubethela ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni, ukuguqulela kwangoko, kunye nokufowuna ngelizwi/ngevidiyo. Umsebenzi wethu ulula: ukunceda abantu baqhagamshelane — ngokukhuselekileyo, ngasese, nakwiilwimi ezahlukeneyo.
about.howDescription: Imiyalezo ibethelwa kwisixhobo sakho ngaphambi kokuba sihambe. Uguqulelo, iikopi, kunye nokuvumelanisa isixhobo zenzelwe ukunciphisa oko kunokubonwa ziiseva zethu.

press.title: Cinezela
press.scanTip: Ukwikhompyutha? Skena ngefowuni yakho ukuze ufumane usetyenziso.
press.contactLine: Ukuba unemibuzo ngabezindaba, nxibelelana nathi apha
press.boilerplateBody: IChatforia sisicelo semiyalezo esigxile kubumfihlo esenza ukuncokola ngeelwimi ezahlukeneyo kube lula. Imiyalezo ibethelwa ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzekelayo, kwaye uguqulelo olwakhelwe ngaphakathi luxhasa iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100 ngexesha langempela. Abasebenzisi banokuvumela imiyalezo enyamalalayo, bagcine iirisithi zokufunda zinganyanzelekanga, kwaye bavumelanise kuzo zonke izixhobo. Ifumaneka kwi-iOS, Android, nakwiwebhu.

data.caption: Onke amalungu ayabelana ngale dama. Siza kukulumkisa xa sele usondele kumda.
data.heading: Idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo

join.body: Uyamenywa ukuba ujoyine iChatforia Family kwaye wabelane ngedatha yabo.
join.error: Asikwazanga ukukongeza kolu sapho. Isimemo sisenokuba asisebenzi okanye siphelelwe lixesha.
join.title: Joyina usapho
join.success: Ujoyine olu sapho. Ngoku wabelana ngedatha yabo.

none.body: Ukuze udale iChatforia Family kunye nedama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo, qalisa iSicwangciso soSapho.
none.title: Akukho seti yosapho okwangoku

error.invite: Ayikwazi ukwenza isimemo. Nceda uqinisekise ukuba ungumnini wosapho kwaye uzame kwakhona.
error.checkout: Asikwazanga ukuqalisa ukuhlawulisa iSicwangciso soSapho. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

invite.body: Thumela i-imeyile okanye ikhonkco lokumema umntu kwidama losapho ekwabelwana ngalo.
invite.title: Mema ilungu elitsha
invite.expiryHint: Le link iphelelwa lixesha emva kweentsuku ezimbalwa. Ungayidala entsha nanini na.

billing.freePlanCopy: Ukwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule ezinye iimpawu.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ungalawula okanye urhoxise ubhaliso lwakho kwi-portal yokuhlawula okanye urhoxise ngqo ngezantsi.
billing.cancelNowError: Ayikwazi ukurhoxisa isicwangciso okwangoku. Nceda uzame kwakhona okanye usebenzise i-Manage Billing.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa isicwangciso ngoko nangoko? Oku akunakurhoxiswa.

refund.intro: Apha eChatforia, sizama ukubonelela ngenkonzo esemgangathweni kubo bonke abasebenzisi bethu. Le nkqubo yokubuyiselwa kwemali ichaza ukuba imbuyekezo inokwenzeka nini.
refund.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo wokubuyiselwa kwemali

contact.body: support@chatforia.com • IChatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, SAD
contact.title: Qhagamshelana

thirdParty.body: Ukuba ukuthengwa kwenziwe ngabantu besithathu abanjengoApple App Store, imbuyekezo kufuneka icelwe ngqo ngaloo maqonga.
thirdParty.title: Ukuthengwa ngumntu wesithathu

eligibility.body: Imbuyiselo inganikwa kwiimeko zokuhlawuliswa kabini, iimpazamo zokuhlawula, okanye imiba yobugcisa ethintela ukufikelela kwiimpawu ezihlawulweyo. Isicelo ngasinye sijongwa ngokwahlukeneyo.
eligibility.title: Imiqathango yembuyekezo

nonRefundable.body: Ngokuqhelekileyo asibuyisi mali ngexesha elingasetyenziswanga, ixesha lokubhalisa elingengako, okanye ukusilela ukurhoxisa ngaphambi kokuba sihlaziye.
nonRefundable.title: Akukho mbuyiselo yemali

subscriptions.body: Ubhaliso luhlawuliswa kwangaphambili rhoqo. Ungazirhoxisa nangaliphi na ixesha ngokusebenzisa useto lweakhawunti yakho okanye iqonga othenge ngalo.
subscriptions.title: Ubhaliso

status.filesNote: Iifayile ezifikelela kwi-5. Isiphelo esimiselweyo siphela kwiiyure ezingama-24.

careers.apply: Indlela yokufaka isicelo: Sebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi ukuze uthumele i-resume yakho kunye neekhonkco nge-imeyile.
careers.intro: Siliqela elincinci labasunguli elakha iChatforia — i-messenger yabucala, yehlabathi jikelele eqalisa kwiwebhu, kwi-iOS, nakwi-Android. Ukuba unomdla malunga nobumfihlo, ukubethela, kunye namava amahle abasebenzisi, singathanda ukuva kuwe.
careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.openRoles: Izikhundla ezivulekileyo zokuseka: Injineli ePhambili ye-Full-stack, Injineli ye-Backend (Node.js), Injineli ye-Frontend/Web (React), Injineli yeSelfowuni (iOS), Injineli yeSelfowuni (Android), i-DevOps/SRE, Injineli yoKhuseleko kunye nokubethela, Injineli yeTelecom (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.whyBullets:
• Nceda ekwakheni isiseko sesithunywa esitsha sehlabathi.
• Nika uphuculo olusetyenziswa kwiwebhu, kwi-iOS, nakwi-Android.
• Sebenzisana ngokuthe ngqo nomsunguli kwisakhiwo semveliso kunye nolwalathiso.
• Zama ukufikelela kwiindawo ezinefuthe elikhulu kwi-stack: imiyalezo, ilizwi, ividiyo, ukubethela, i-telecom, i-AI.
• Joyina kwangethuba — ngaphambi kokuba isiseko sabasebenzisi sande.

premium.heading: Yiya kwiPremium
premium.description: Vula iimpawu ezinamandla kwaye ususe iintengiso.

esim.desc: Fumana idatha yeselula yeChatforia xa ungekho kwi-Wi-Fi.
esim.title: I-Chatforia eSIM

profile.title: Iprofayili yomsebenzisi
profile.portHint: Ngaba ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yangoku? Ungayithumela kwiChatforia Wireless.
profile.backupDesc: Yenza ikopi yesitshixo sakho sokubethela ukuze ubuyisele imiyalezo yakho ngokukhuselekileyo kwenye isixhobo.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha ubuncinane indawo enye oya kuyo (umnxeba okanye i-imeyile).
profile.followHint: Amabali abo aza kuvela kwi-Followers feed yakho ukuba bathumela kubaphulaphuli babalandeli (okanye basesidlangalaleni).
profile.ageBandHint: Ndigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka (hayi umhla wokuzalwa ochanekileyo). Isetyenziselwa ukufana okufanelekileyo kwiRandom Chat.
profile.keysRotated: Isibini esitsha sezitshixo senziwe kwaye isitshixo sikawonke-wonke silayishiwe.
profile.freePlanCopy: Ukwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule ezinye iimpawu ezifana neekopi, amanani ongezelelweyo, kunye neendlela zobumfihlo eziphambili.
profile.importFailed: Ukungenisa isitshixo akuphumelelanga (igama eligqithisiweyo elingalunganga okanye ifayile eyonakeleyo).
profile.noPrivateKey: Akukho sitshixo sabucala sokuthumela ngaphandle kwesi sixhobo.
profile.errQuietHours: Amaxesha okuphumla kufuneka abe phakathi kwe-0 kunye ne-23.
profile.foriaRemember: Vumela uRiya akhumbule izinto omxelela zona.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Isitshixo sakho sabucala asiphumi kwesi sixhobo. Thumela ikopi ekhuselweyo ngegama lokugqitha ukuze uyibuyisele kwenye isixhobo.
profile.voicemailNote: Ii-voicemail ezivela kwiinombolo zakho zeChatforia zigcinwa kwibhokisi yakho yemiyalezo ye-voicemail. Ungavumela ukukhutshelwa kunye nokudluliselwa kwemiyalezo kwiiplani ezixhaswayo.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Ukwisicwangciso sasimahla — sebenzisa ukhetho olukhawulezayo lweLanga/iNyanga olungezantsi. Phucula ukuze ufumane ezinye iithimu.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ayikwazi ukuvula i-portal yokuhlawula. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngenxa yezizathu zokhuseleko, iiakhawunti ezikuluhlu lweminyaka eli-13–17 zinokudityaniswa kuphela nezinye iiakhawunti zeminyaka eli-13–17 kwi-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Xa oku kuvuliwe, uForia angasebenzisa iincoko zakho zangaphambili zeRandom Chat (kunye nawe kuphela) ukuze aqhubeke ethetha. Ungayicima le nto nangaliphi na ixesha.
profile.setBackupPassword: Seta igama lokugqitha ukuze ubhale ngemfihlo ikopi yakho yokugcina idatha:
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle kweli candelo.
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Xa ivuliwe, sizama ukukufanisa nabantu abaneminyaka efanayo.
profile.enterBackupPassword: Faka igama lokugqitha kule kopi yogcino:
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ulutsha luhlala luthandana nolutsha kuphela. Abantu abadala abanakukwazi ukudibana nolutsha.
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Isetyenziswa xa umbuliso wakho wesandi ungafumaneki.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Thumela iifowuni ezingenayo kunye nemiyalezo kwifowuni yakho eqinisekisiweyo okanye kwi-imeyile. Iminxeba/imiyalezo ephumayo inokubonisa inombolo yakho yeChatforia.

support.heading: Singakunceda njani?
support.sendError: Ayikwazi ukuthumela. Nceda uthumele i-imeyile ku-support@chatforia.com endaweni yoko.
support.contactIntro: Siza kuphendula nge-imeyile. Nceda ufake iinkcukacha ukuze usincede siphinde sivelise ingxaki.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa i-eSIM yehlabathi. Ukufumaneka kwayo kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho nakwisixhobo sakho. Uza kubona iinketho ezixhaswayo ngexesha lokuvula ngaphakathi kwe-app.

free.a: Ewe. Isicwangciso sasimahla siquka inombolo yeChatforia, iifowuni, kunye nemiyalezo eneentengiso. Ungahlala kwiFree ixesha elide njengoko ufuna okanye uphucule ukuze ususe iintengiso kwaye uvule ezinye iimpawu.

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Rhoqo Ngamaxabiso kunye nezicwangciso

cancel.a: Ewe. Ungalawula okanye urhoxise ubhaliso lwakho kwiphepha lokuhlawulisa elingaphakathi kwi-app. Utshintsho luqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwexesha lokuhlawulisa langoku.
cancel.q: Ngaba ndingazirhoxisa okanye nditshintshe izicwangciso nangaliphi na ixesha?

family.a: Izicwangciso zosapho zenza idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngayo kwiiakhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia. Umntu omnye uhlawula ityala, kwaye ungamema okanye ususe amalungu kwaye ubeke imida kumntu ngamnye.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa iintengiso kwaye yandisa imbali yemiyalezo — ifanelekile ukusetyenziswa kwemihla ngemihla. I-Premium yongeza ukwenziwa ngokwezifiso okongezelelweyo, izixhobo zokubhala ngokutsha kunye nokuphendula nge-AI, kunye nenkxaso ephambili kubasebenzisi abanzima.
plusPremium.q: Yintoni umahluko phakathi kwePlus kunye nePremium?

error.deviceLimit: Umda wesixhobo ufikelele kwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phuma kwenye isixhobo okanye uphucule uye kwiPremium ukuze uqhagamshele ezinye izixhobo.
error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingasebenziyo. Nceda ujonge igama lomsebenzisi/i-imeyile kunye negama lokugqitha.

login.title: Qhubela phambili uye eChatforia

forgot.title: Ndilibale igama eligqithisiweyo
forgot.helper: Faka i-imeyile oyisebenzisileyo ukwenza iakhawunti yakho yeChatforia kwaye siya kukuthumelela ikhonkco elikhuselekileyo lokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi yakho.
forgot.sentHelper: Ukuba kukho iakhawunti ephethe loo imeyile, sithumele ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona igama lokugqitha. Kungathatha imizuzu embalwa. Jonga ugaxekile okanye iintengiso.
forgot.genericError: Ayikwazi ukucubungula isicelo. Nceda uzame kwakhona kungekudala.

login.subtitle: Ngena kwiakhawunti yakho yeChatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: Ukungena kube kanye akufumaneki okwangoku. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha endaweni yoko.

greetings.long2: Molo {{name}} 😊 Yintoni ongathanda ukuthetha ngayo namhlanje?
greetings.long5: Molo {{name}} 😊 Ngaba ufuna ukuveza imbilini yakho, ubuze umbuzo, okanye uncokole nje?
greetings.short2: Wamkelekile kwakhona {{name}} 👋 Ngaba kukho enye into obufuna ukuyongeza?
greetings.short3: Buyela kwakhona, {{name}}? 😊 Ndixelele ukuba ucinga ntoni.
greetings.short4: Molo {{name}} 👋 Ukulungele ukuqhubeka apho besiyeke khona?
greetings.short6: Hayi bo {{name}}!! Ngaba kukho into entsha ocinga ngayo?

voice.body: I-app yanamhlanje, uyilo lwehlabathi, kunye noguqulelo olwakhelwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokudlulisela iifowuni ngendlela yakudala.
voice.title: IChatforia vs iGoogle Voice

textnow.body: Iintengiso ezilula kwiFree, uphuculo olulula lwe-Plus xa ulungile, kunye nezixhobo zePremium ezingenazo iTextNow.
textnow.title: IChatforia vs TextNow

messengers.body: Thumela imiyalezo kwiinombolo zefowuni zokwenyani — kungekuphela nje kwabanye abasebenzisi be-app — nge-AI kunye nesimo sayo. Kulungile ukuba uvela kwii-apps ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe.
messengers.title: Ii-apps zeChatforia vs chat

why.title: Kutheni abantu betshintshela kwiChatforia

history.chatforia: Ukuya kuthi ga kwiinyanga ezili-12 nangaphezulu

why.subtitle: IChatforia ikunika inombolo yefowuni yokwenyani, inguqulelo ekrelekrele, kunye nendlela ecacileyo yokungena kwiintengiso xa ulungile.
why.disclaimer: Uthelekiso olusekelwe kulwazi olufumaneka esidlangalaleni kwaye lunokutshintsha ngokuhamba kwexesha. Ezinye ii-apps zokuthumela imiyalezo yasimahla ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe ngokubanzi zifana ne-TextNow.

free.desc: Qala ukuthumela imiyalezo simahla. Ilungele ukuba uzama iChatforia.
free.title: Mahala

features.ai: Iimpendulo ezikrelekrele ze-AI kunye noguqulelo olukhawulezileyo (ukusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo)
features.chat: Incoko yeqela ngexesha langempela, kunye neefowuni zelizwi nezevidiyo
features.media: Yabelana ngeefoto, imiyalezo yelizwi, kunye neevidiyo ezimfutshane
features.disappearing: Imiyalezo enyamalalayo kunye nolawulo olusisiseko lwabucala

plus.desc: Zonke izinto ezisisiseko ngaphandle kweentengiso. Zilungele imiyalezo yemihla ngemihla kunye nokufowuna.
plus.title: Ukongeza

features.history: Imbali yemiyalezo ende (ukuya kuthi ga kwiinyanga ezi-6)
features.support: Inkxaso ekhawulezileyo xa kukho into engahambi kakuhle
features.forwarding: Thumela iminxeba kunye nemiyalezo kwinombolo yakho yokwenyani yefowuni

premiumAnnual.desc: Gcina imali engaphezulu xa uhlawuliswa minyaka le — kuquka imixholo yombala eyongezelelweyo, izixhobo ze-AI, kunye nenkxaso ephambili.
premiumAnnual.title: Iprimiyamu (yonyaka)

features.save25: Gcina malunga ne-30% xa kuthelekiswa neentlawulo zenyanga
features.bestFor: Ilungele abasebenzisi bombane, abasebenzi abakude, kunye nabahambi rhoqo
features.allPremium: Yonke into evela kwiPremium Monthly — kuquka nezinye imixholo zemibala

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Ihlawulwe kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo ifihliweyo.

premiumMonthly.desc: Amava apheleleyo eChatforia: Izixhobo ze-AI, ukwenza ngokwezifiso, kunye nenkxaso ephambili.
premiumMonthly.title: Iprimiyamu (ngenyanga)

features.ai: Izixhobo ze-AI eziphambili zokubhala ngokutsha, iimpendulo ezikrelekrele, kunye nezishwankathelo
features.themes: Vula zonke ii-themes zemibala yeprimiyamu kunye nokwenza ngokwezifiso ii-app

sms.body: Ukuba unikezela ngenombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, uyavuma ukuba iChatforia inokukuthumelela imiyalezo yeSMS enxulumene neakhawunti yakho kunye nokusetyenziswa kwenkonzo, njengezaziso zokungena, izaziso zokhuseleko, kunye nemiyalezo enxulumene neencoko oziqalayo okanye ozithatha inxaxheba kuzo. Asisebenzisi iSMS kwimiyalezo yokukhuthaza okanye yokuthengisa ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo. Amaxabiso aqhelekileyo emiyalezo kunye nedatha angasebenza. Ungakhetha ukuphuma kwimiyalezo yeSMS nangaliphi na ixesha ngokuphendula igama elingundoqo elixhaswayo lokungabhalisi (umz., "YIMA") okanye ngokuhlaziya useto lwakho lwesaziso kwi-app.
sms.title: Unxibelelwano lweSMS

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa iChatforia, uyavumelana nale Migqaliselo. Ukuba awuvumelani, musa ukuyisebenzisa le nkonzo.

changes.body: Singazihlaziya ezi migaqo; ukuqhubeka nokusetyenziswa emva kokuba utshintsho luthetha ukwamkelwa.
changes.title: Utshintsho

contact.body: support@chatforia.com • IChatforia LLC, 123 Example St, eSheridan, WY 82801, eMelika
contact.title: Qhagamshelana

accounts.title: Iiakhawunti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Nika ulwazi oluchanekileyo kwaye ugcine iziqinisekiso zikhuselekile.

disclaimer.body: Le Nkonzo inikezelwa "njengoko injalo" ngaphandle kweziqinisekiso. Kangangoko umthetho uvumela, iChatforia ayinaxanduva lomonakalo ongathanga ngqo okanye obangelwe yiloo nto.
disclaimer.title: Izilumkiso kunye neeNgxelo zoXanduva

yourContent.body: Ugcina amalungelo omxholo wakho. Usinika amalungelo afunekayo okusebenzisa le nkonzo (umz. ukuhambisa, ukugcina, ukuguqulela).
yourContent.title: Umxholo wakho

acceptableUse.title: Ukusetyenziswa okwamkelekileyo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho mxholo ungekho mthethweni, oxhaphazayo okanye okhubekisayo; akukho spam okanye ukuxhatshazwa okwenziwa ngokuzenzekelayo.

upgrade.title: Uphuculo

rooms.tip: Icebiso: yabelana ngeli gama nabanye okanye uqhagamshele nzulu kwi /video?room=ime-sobe .
rooms.desc: Ividiyo yamalungu amaninzi esebenzisa igama legumbi ekwabelwana ngalo.
rooms.title: Amagumbi
rooms.subtitle: Yenza igumbi okanye ujoyine elikhoyo ngokufaka igama elifanayo.

video.title: Ividiyo

direct.title: Ividiyo ebukhoma
direct.subtitle: Qala umnxeba wevidiyo oqala ngo-1:1 usebenzisa inombolo yakho yefowuni okanye igama lomsebenzisi laseChatforia.
direct.tipInvite: Icebiso: Ncamathisela inombolo uze utsalele umnxeba ngaphandle kokugcina umntu oqhagamshelana naye. Siza kutsalela umnxeba abantu abangengabo abasebenzisi ngekhonkco.

video.roomsDesc: Ividiyo yabantu abaninzi esebenzisa igama legumbi ekwabelwana ngalo.
video.roomsIntro: Joyina okanye udale igumbi elinamalungu amaninzi.

dialer.title: Iifowuni
dialer.subtitle: Ikhibhodi kunye nezinto zamva nje. (Ukuba awusebenzisi i-PSTN, qala iifowuni ukusuka kwisihloko sencoko.)

large.desc: Ibandakanya i-80GB yedatha ekhawulezileyo ekwabelwana ngayo — kwiintsapho zamandla ezihlala zikwi-intanethi.
large.title: Usapho lakwaVeliki

small.desc: Ibandakanya idatha yesantya esiphezulu engama-20GB ekwabelwana ngayo — ilungele abasebenzisi bokukhanya aba-2–3.
small.title: Usapho lakwaMali

family.title: Usapho lwaseChatforia (idatha ekwabelwana ngayo)

medium.desc: Ibandakanya idatha yesantya esiphezulu eyi-40GB ekwabelwana ngayo — ilungele amalungu asebenzayo angama-3–5.
medium.title: Usapho oluPhakathi

feature.shared: Idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo losapho lwakho
feature.fairUse: Kuxhomekeke ekusebenziseni ngokufanelekileyo kunye nemiqathango yasekuhlaleni
feature.members: Mema amalungu ongezelelweyo ukuya kuthi ga kwi-4

family.footnote: Izicwangciso zosapho zabelana ngedatha enye kwiiakhawunti zeChatforia ezidityanisiweyo. Ukufumaneka kunye nemida kuxhomekeke kwimithetho yelizwe lakho neyendawo.
family.subtitle: Yabelana ngedatha enye kusapho. Iakhawunti enye, iiakhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia, kunye nogutyungelo lwehlabathi.
family.disclaimer: Izicwangciso zosapho zenza okanye zongeze kwidama ledatha ekwabelwana ngayo. Ungamema kwaye ususe amalungu nangaliphi na ixesha.

mobile.note: Asithengisi iipakethe zedatha ezingaphantsi kwe-3 GB.

large.aria: Thenga iphakheji yedatha ye-eSIM yomsebenzisi osebenzayo
large.desc: Ibandakanya i-10 GB yedatha ekhawulezayo yencoko enzulu, iifowuni kunye nevidiyo kwinethiwekhi yeChatforia.
large.title: Iphakheji yomsebenzisi wamandla
large.bestFor: Ingxoxo enzulu, iifowuni, ividiyo kunye nokusetyenziswa kwe-hotspot

small.desc: Ibandakanya idatha ekhawulezayo ye-3GB — ilungele ukuthumela imiyalezo elula kunye neefowuni ngamanye amaxesha.
small.title: Iphakheji yokuqalisa
small.bestFor: Uhambo olufutshane, imiyalezo emincinci kunye neefowuni ezibanjwa ngamanye amaxesha

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data package)

medium.desc: Ibandakanya i-5GB yedatha ekhawulezayo yokuhamba, ukuhamba, kunye neefowuni zeVoIP eziqhelekileyo.
medium.title: Iphakheji yabahambi
medium.bestFor: Uhambo lwempelaveki, iifowuni zeVoIP eziqhelekileyo kunye namatikiti

compare.title: Thelekisa izicwangciso zedatha ye-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetyenziswa kwedatha okwenyani kuxhomekeke kwindlela oyisebenzisa ngayo iChatforia (ilizwi, ividiyo, imidiya, kunye nezinye ii-apps kwifowuni yakho).

mobile.subtitle: Yongeza idatha yehlabathi ukuze iChatforia isebenze nokuba ingenayo i-Wi-Fi. Amaxabiso alungiswa ngokuzenzekelayo ngokwelizwe lakho kunye nemali yakho.

disclaimer.devices: Izicwangciso zedatha ye-eSIM zifuna isixhobo esihambelana ne-eSIM nesivuliweyo. Ukufumaneka kuyahluka ngokwemodeli yefowuni, inkampani, kunye nelizwe. Ugutyungelwa kunye nesantya ziyahluka ngokwengingqi.

mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha isicwangciso sedatha sehlabathi esiza kusebenza kube kanye ukuze iChatforia isebenze xa useluhambeni okanye ungekho kwi-Wi-Fi.

sounds.freeNotice: Ukwi-free — iiringithoni zeprimiyamu ziyaboniswa kodwa zitshixiwe. Phucula ukuze uvule yonke into.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
contact.errorSend: Ayikwazi ukuthumela. Nceda uthumele i-imeyile ku-support@chatforia.com.
contact.successMsg: Enkosi — iqela lethu liza kuphendula nge-imeyile.

cookies.body: IChatforia isebenzisa iikuki ezincinci (umz. iseshoni, ukhuseleko). Asisebenzisi iikuki zomntu wesithathu kwiintengiso. Lawula iikuki ngokusebenzisa useto lwesikhangeli sakho.
cookies.title: Useto lweekuki

upgrade.subtitle: Khetha isicwangciso se-app, yongeza iipakethe zedatha ngokwakho, okanye wabelane ngedatha nosapho lwakho — konke kwindawo enye.

doNotSell.body: IChatforia ayithengisi ulwazi lomntu. Abemi baseCalifornia basenokufaka amabango phantsi kweCPRA besebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi.
doNotSell.title: Musa ukuthengisa okanye ukwabelana ngolwazi lwam lomntu.

marketing.annualDisclaimer: Ihlawulwe kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo ifihliweyo.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Gcina imali engaphezulu xa uhlawuliswa minyaka le.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Iimpawu ezipheleleyo, iiringithoni kunye nezixhobo ze-AI.

aiSettings.title: Useto lwe-AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Lawula inguqulelo yeForiaBot, iimpendulo ezikrelekrele, kunye neempendulo ezizenzekelayo.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Thumela imiyalezo embalwa yokugqibela efunyenweyo (ehlanjululweyo) kwi-AI ukuze ucebise iimpendulo ezikhawulezayo.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Ukuba ivuliwe, iziphakamiso ezibuyiselwe yi-AI ziya kuba ziphawule amagama afihliweyo.

upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ngesicwangciso sethu sasimahla ngeentengiso. Yiya ngaphandle kweentengiso ngePlus okanye uvule iimpawu ezinamandla ngokupheleleyo ngePremium.

account.a: Khuphela usetyenziso okanye usebenzise iwebhu, cofa u-"Dala iAkhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyile/ifowuni. Sebenzisa u-"Ulibele igama eligqithisiweyo" ukuze ufumane kwakhona.

contact.a: Nxibelelana nathi ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka imifanekiso-skrini kunye nohlobo lwe-app.

privacy.a: Ewe. Imiyalezo kunye neefowuni zibethelwa ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzekelayo. Nguwe kunye nomamkeli kuphela onokuzifunda.
privacy.q: Ngaba imiyalezo ibhalwe ngekhowudi ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekupheleni?

translate.a: Nika amandla "Uguqulelo oluzenzekelayo" kwiSetingi → Inkangeleko kunye nolwimi. Uguqulelo lwenziwa kwisixhobo apho sixhaswa khona, kungenjalo ngee-API ezikhuselekileyo ezine-metadata encinci.

peoplePage.syncTip: Icebiso: Imiyalezo yakho ihlala ivunyelaniswe kwiwebhu nakwiselula.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Yabelana ngekhonkco lakho lesimemo ukuze uqalise ukuncokola ngoko nangoko.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Hlala unxibelelana neChatforia xa usohambeni kwi-iOS nakwi-Android.
peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Khangela ngegama elingelolakho, igama, igama lomsebenzisi okanye ifowuni

randomChat.title: Incoko engacwangciswanga
randomChat.setAge: Misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwiProfayili → Ingxoxo yoBudala kunye neRandom ukuze ihambelane nabantu.
randomChat.subtitle: Dibana nomntu omtsha ngoko nangoko okanye ukhethe ukuncokola noRia.
randomChat.description: Dibana nomntu omtsha ngoko nangoko. Siza kukufanisa size sivule igumbi lencoko lexeshana. Thetha ungaziwa ekuqaleni. Yongeza umhlobo kamva ukuba uyayithanda.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Ndigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka (hayi umhla wokuzalwa ochanekileyo). Isetyenziselwa ukufana okufanelekileyo kwiRandom Chat. Ukuze ufanise nabantu (hayi iRiaBot kuphela), seta uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwiSetingi → Age kunye neRandom Chat.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze ufanise nabantu (hayi iRiaBot kuphela), seta uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwiSetingi → Ingxoxo yoBudala kunye neRandom.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwiProfayili → Ingxoxo yoBudala kunye neRandom ukuze ihambelane nabantu.

directVideo.intro: Qala umnxeba wevidiyo othe ngqo we-1:1.

upgrade.benefitsLine: Vula iimpawu ezinamandla kwaye ususe iintengiso.

phoneWarning.body: Inombolo yakho {{number}} iya kukhutshwa ngomhla we-{{date}} ngaphandle kokuba iphinde yasebenza.
phoneWarning.title: Inombolo yakho iphelelwa lixesha kungekudala.

upgrade.subtitle.app: Qala ngesicwangciso sethu sasimahla ngeentengiso. Sebenzisa i-Plus ngaphandle kweentengiso okanye uvule iimpawu ezinamandla ngokupheleleyo ngePremium.

sms.body: Ukuba ukhetha ukubonelela ngenombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela iimpawu ezinje ngokuqinisekiswa kweakhawunti, izilumkiso zokungena, kunye nemiyalezo yomsebenzisi ukuya kumsebenzisi ngeSMS apho ixhaswa khona. Singathumela imiyalezo ye-SMS yentengiselwano enxulumene neakhawunti yakho kunye nomsebenzi kwiChathoria. Ungakhetha ukungafumani imiyalezo ye-SMS nangaliphi na ixesha ngokuphendula igama elingundoqo elixhaswayo lokungabhalisi (umz., "YIMA") okanye ngokutshintsha ukhetho lwakho lwesaziso kwi-app. Asiyithengisi inombolo yakho yefowuni okanye siyisebenzisele ukuthengisa okungahambelaniyo.
sms.title: Iinombolo zefowuni eziphathwayo kunye ne-SMS

intro.body: Le Migaqo-nkqubo Yabucala ichaza indlela iChatforia (“thina”, “thina”) eqokelela, isebenzise kwaye yabelane ngayo ngolwazi xa usebenzisa usetyenziso kunye neenkonzo zethu. Siyila iChatforia ukuze sinciphise ulwazi esinokufikelela kulo.

rights.body: Ngokuxhomekeke kummandla okuwo (umz. i-GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela ukufikelela, ukulungiswa, ukususwa okanye ukuhoywa kwinqubo ethile. Qhagamshelana no: privacy@chatforia.com.
rights.title: Amalungelo akho

changes.body: Siza kuthumela uhlaziyo apha kwaye sihlaziye umhla "wokugqibela wokuhlaziywa".
changes.title: Utshintsho

contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • IChatforia LLC, 123 Example St, eSheridan, WY 82801, eMelika
contact.title: Qhagamshelana

sharing.body: Asithengisi idatha yobuqu. Sinokwabelana ngedatha encinci nabaprosesa (umz. izaziso zokutyhala, uhlalutyo) phantsi kwezivumelwano ezingqongqo.
sharing.title: Ukwabelana

children.body: IChatforia ayenzelwanga abantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eli-13 ubudala (okanye njengoko kufuneka ngokomthetho wendawo yakho).
children.title: Abantwana

howWeUse.title: Indlela esisebenzisa ngayo ulwazi
howWeUse.provide: Ukubonelela ngeenkonzo kunye nokhuseleko (ukuqinisekiswa, ukufunyanwa kwe-spam/ukuxhatshazwa).

retention.body: Sigcina kuphela oko kuyimfuneko ukuze sisebenzise le nkonzo kwaye sisebenzise ukhuseleko olusemgangathweni weshishini. Asinakukwazi ukususa ukubethela umxholo we-E2E.
retention.title: Ukugcinwa kwedatha kunye nokhuseleko

infoWeCollect.title: Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo
infoWeCollect.account: Ulwazi lweakhawunti (umz. i-imeyile/umnxeba) ukuze kudalwe kwaye kukhuselwe iakhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Umxholo ofihliweyo (imiyalezo/iifowuni) ufihliwe ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekugqibeleni; asinakuwufunda.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Ukuxilongwa/ukusetyenziswa okufana neengxelo zokuphahlazeka, uhlobo lwesixhobo, okanye uhlalutyo olucwangcisiweyo ukuphucula ukusebenza.

alert.text: Esi sikhokelo siza kukhula njengoko siqalisa iimpawu ezintsha. Ukuba kukho into engekhoyo, nceda usazise ngokusebenzisa

gettingStarted.title: Qala

section2.item1: Yenza i-DM okanye iqela uze uthumele umyalezo wokuqala.
section2.item2: Sebenzisa uguqulelo olukhawulezileyo kwincoko kwiilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
section2.item3: Zama ukunyamalala kwemiyalezo uze ufunde iirisithi kwiProfayili → Ubumfihlo.
section2.title: 2) Qalisa imiyalezo

section3.item1: Ungaphucula uye kwisicwangciso esihlawulelwayo nangaliphi na ixesha ngaphakathi kwi-app.
section3.item2: Wakuba ungene ngemvume, ungaqhagamshela izixhobo ezongezelelweyo kwaye usete ii-backups ezifihliweyo ezivela kwiSetingi kwi-app.
section3.title: 3) Qhubela phambili.

gettingStarted.subtitle: Uqala eChatforia? Esi sikhokelo sikhawulezayo sikubonisa iziseko zokuba nemveliso ngemizuzu embalwa.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Ukubethela okuqinileyo ukusuka ekuqaleni ukuya ekupheleni
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Gcina umbhalo ofihliweyo kuphela kwiseva. Ikhubaza uphononongo lwe-AI/Translation kunye nolwe-moderation.

startChatModal.title: Qalisa incoko
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Faka igama lakho lomsebenzisi okanye inombolo yefowuni uze ucinezele uKhangelo.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Iifowuni/ii-imeyile ziya kufumaneka emva kokuba uzigcinile njengoonxibelelwano.
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Faka igama lakho, igama lomsebenzisi, ifowuni okanye i-imeyile...

upgrade.subtitle.family: Yenza idama ledatha ekwabelwana ngalo losapho lwakho kwaye ulawule ukusetyenziswa komntu wonke kwindawo enye.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Yongeza idatha ye-eSIM yehlabathi ukuze iChatforia isebenze nokuba ungekho kwi-Wi-Fi.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Akukho nombolo inikwe. Khetha ikhowudi yendawo ukuze uqale ukuthumela imiyalezo.

accessibilitySettings.title: Ukufikeleleka kunye nezilumkiso
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Isikrini sokudanyaza kwifowuni engenayo
Ifleshi emfutshane ekhanyayo xa umnxeba ukhala.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Dlidliza kwimiyalezo emitsha (xa ixhaswa)
Qalisa ukudlidliza kwesixhobo ngezaziso.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Bonisa iibhena kunye nezihloko ezibengezelayo ukuze ungaphoswa ngumsebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Iindlela zokwenza iChatforia ibe lula ukuyisebenzisa ngaphandle kokuxhomekeka kwisandi.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Izilumkiso ezibonakalayo zemiyalezo kunye neefowuni
Bonisa iibhena kunye nezihloko ezikhanyayo ukuze ungaphoswa yimisebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Dlibha xa imiyalezo emitsha isetyenziswa (xa ixhaswa)
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Iqala ngobukhulu obuqhelekileyo. Yongeza ukuba ukhetha umbhalo omkhulu kwiindawo zokufikelela.

keySetup.title: Seta izitshixo zesixhobo
keySetup.imported: Isitshixo sabucala singeniswe kwesi sixhobo. Ngoku ungafunda imiyalezo emidala.
keySetup.chooseFile: Khetha ifayile uze ufake igama lokugqitha.
keySetup.description: Esi sixhobo asinaso isitshixo sakho sabucala okwangoku. Ngenisa ikopi yogcino olukhuselweyo ngephasiwedi okanye uvelise isibini esitsha sesitshixo (uya kukwazi ukufunda imiyalezo emitsha ukususela ngoku).
keySetup.enterPassword: Nceda ufake igama lokugqitha leakhawunti yakho ukuze sikwazi ukugcina iikopi zezitshixo zakho ngokukhuselekileyo.

port.heading: Faka inombolo ekhoyo
port.success: Isicelo sePort sithunyelwe! Siza kukugcina usesikhathini.
port.subheading: Dlulisa inombolo yakho yefowuni yangoku ukusuka kwinkampani yakho ekhoyo ukuya kwiChatforia. Qinisekisa ukuba iinkcukacha zihambelana ngokuchanekileyo neakhawunti yakho yenkampani ukuze uphephe ukulibaziseka.

wireless.title: I-Chatforia Wireless

status.heading: Imeko yokudlulisa
status.subheading: Landelela imeko yezicelo zakho zokuhambisa inombolo.

options.heading: Khetha indlela ofuna ukuyisebenzisa ngayo iChatforia
options.portNumber: Thumela inombolo yakho yangoku kwiChatforia Wireless
options.subheading: Ungafumana inombolo entsha yeChatforia okanye udlulisele inombolo yakho ekhoyo komnye umsebenzisi.

wireless.exhausted: Idatha yakho iphelile. Thenga isicwangciso esitsha sokuqhubeka nokusebenzisa idatha yeselula.
wireless.description: Lawula isicwangciso sakho seselula seChatforia, amanani, ukuthunyelwa kunye nokuhanjiswa kwamanani.

why.deals: Izivumelwano ezithe ngqo okanye ngokwenkqubo nge-AdSense/Google Ads

why.sponsoredMoments: IiMoments ezixhasiweyo (umz. i-modal ethi “Start Chat”) ziyafumaneka

form.mailtoInfo: Ndivula iklayenti yam ye-imeyile ukuze ndithumele umbuzo…
form.submittedMsg: Enkosi! Umbuzo wakho usendleleni. Siza kubuyela kuwe kungekudala.
form.missingRequired: Nceda ubhale igama lakho, i-imeyile kunye nomyalezo wakho.

advertise.title: Thengisa ngeChatforia

adsense.noPubIdShort: Sikwabonelela ngezinye izinto ezikwi-inventri ngeGoogle AdSense. Uxhaso oluthe ngqo luyafumaneka — sebenzisa ifomu elingezantsi.
adsense.withPubIdShort: Sikwabonelela ngempahla esetyenzisiweyo ngeGoogle AdSense. Ungajonga iChatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pubId}} okanye usebenzise le fomu ingezantsi ukuze ufumane inkxaso-mali ngokuthe ngqo.

advertise.description: Fikelela abasebenzisi bemiyalezo ababandakanyekayo ngeendawo ezintle nezikhuselekileyo. Sinikezela ngoluhlu lweebhena kwiindawo ezibonakala kakhulu, uxhaso, kunye nokukhushulwa kwezindlu. Ababhalisileyo beprimiyamu ababoni zintengiso.
advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sigqibezela uluhlu lwethu lwentengiso. Sixelele ngephulo lakho kwaye siza kukucebisa ngezikhundla.

messageInput.caption: Isihloko (ukhetho)
messageInput.freeLimit: Isithintelo sesicwangciso sasimahla: cima ngokuzenzekelayo ukuya kuthi ga kusuku olu-1. Ilinganiselwe kwi-1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Ubukhulu bokucima ngokuzenzekelayo kwiPremium ziintsuku ezingama-30. Kulinganiselwe kwiiyure ezingama-30 kuphela.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Thayipha umyalezo okanye uncamathisele ifayile ukuze uyithumele.

startChatModal.title: Qala incoko
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Akukho bantu baqhagamshelana nabo abahambelana nophendlo lwakho.
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Khangela igama, igama lomsebenzisi okanye inombolo yefowuni

addContactModal.title: Yongeza unxibelelwano
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Faka inombolo yakho yefowuni okanye igama lomsebenzisi.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Esi sikhangeli asikwazi okwangoku ukususa iimfihlo kwimiyalezo yakho efihliweyo. Nceda uhlaziye, uvule, okanye usete kwakhona isitshixo sakho ukuze uqhubeke.

encryptionRecovery.title: Lawula ukubethela

errors.noBackup: Akukho kopi yekopi efihliweyo yale akhawunti.
errors.noServerPublicKey: Le akhawunti ayivezi isitshixo sikawonke-wonke seseva okwangoku.
errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukufunyanwa kwesitshixo akukagqitywa okanye akulunganga kule akhawunti
errors.serverBackupMismatch: I-backup yeseva ayifani nesitshixo sokubethela iakhawunti yangoku.

unlockPasscode.label: Vula igama eligqithisiweyo (isixhobo sangoku)
unlockPasscode.description: Isetyenziselwa ukususa ii-crypt keys kwindawo yakho ngaphambi kokuba ithunyelwe ngaphandle

newLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi entsha yendawo
newLocalPasscode.description: Khusela izitshixo xa ziphumle kwesi sikhangeli

resetLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi entsha yendawo
resetLocalPasscode.description: Kufuneka ngaphambi kokuba kusetyenziswe kwakhona ukuze isitshixo esitsha sikhuseleke kwesi sixhobo

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi egciniweyo
restoreBackupPassword.description: Iphasiwedi oyidalile xa ugcina ikopi yesitshixo sakho se-iPhone

confirm.reset:
Usete kwakhona ukubethela kule akhawunti?

Imiyalezo emidala ebethelweyo isenokungafundeki ngaphandle kokuba kamva ubuyisele isitshixo sokuqala.

encryptionRecovery.description: Yenza i-backup, buyisela, vula, okanye usete kwakhona isitshixo sakho sokubethela.
encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Oku kuvelisa isitshixo esitsha sokubethela kwiakhawunti yakho. Imiyalezo emidala ebethelweyo isenokungafundeki ngaphandle kokuba kamva ubuyisele isitshixo sokuqala.
